prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve already noticed it — that means you’re ready. It’s okay you put it off; today you get to change that story. Do one small thing right now: set a 5‑minute timer and start the very first step (even if it’s just opening the file or writing one sentence). Momentum builds fast — one completed tiny task turns avoidance into progress. You’ve handled hard things before; this is the next one. Go do it.
